reasoning: Lithuania is currently not a favorite to win Eurovision 2025. Following their selection of the rock song "Tavo akys", their betting odds initially placed them around 15th place in late February. Recent odds from March show Sweden, Austria, and France dominating the top spots. Lithuania has historically never won the contest, and their current standing in bookmaker predictions reflects a very low probability of an overall victory. The Polymarket trading price of 1% further matches the implied probability derived from their betting odds given they remain a mid-tier contender. Therefore, 2% represents a conservative but confident upper bound on their chances.
